form.description: The word as it appears in the example sentence (e.g. 폭풍, pulite)

lemma.description: Dictionary form with optional particle notation. Null if unavailable.

pos.description: Part of speech (e.g. noun, verb, past, i-adjective). Null if unspecified.

grammatical_note.description: Grammatical metadata: gender/number for Romance languages (e.g. feminine, plural), politeness register for Korean (e.g. informal and polite speech), case for Russian. Null if none.

example.description: Example sentence in the target language

example_translation.description: English translation of the example sentence. Null if unavailable.
